name: Cranberry Drop Cookies
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces fresh or frozen cranberries, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream together the butter and sugars.
2. Add the egg, milk, and lemon juice; mix well.
3. Combine the dry ingredients separately.
4. Gradually add the dry mixture to the creamed mixture and mix until well combined.
5. Stir in the cranberries and walnuts.
6. Drop heaping teaspoonfuls of dough 2 inches apart onto greased baking sheets.
7. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 13-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Cool on wire racks.
Yield: 5 dozen
